criteria.criterion: DBB-m23-001: Pipe error propagation — multi-line error shows first line only (execSingleWithError returns hadError flag; execPipeline clears output on error)
DBB-m23-002: Pipe error propagation — legitimate output not treated as error (isErrorOutput regex /^\w[\w-]*: .+: .+/ checks first line only)
DBB-m23-004: Pipe whitespace-prefixed output not treated as error (isErrorOutput requires first char to be \w)
DBB-m23-005: cp directory without -r returns standard UNIX error format (cp-error.test.ts: '-r not specified; omitting directory')
DBB-m23-006: cp directory without -r does NOT contain '(use -r)' suffix (cp-error.test.ts: `expect(output).not.toContain('is a directory')`)
